title: [v4.0-rhel] container: do not create .containerenv with -v SRC:/run
body:
if /run is on a volume do not create the file /run/.containerenv as it would leak outside of the container.

Closes: https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/14577

Backporting #14582 to v4.0-rhel to complete the backports to https://issues.redhat.com/browse/OCPBUGS-7522

Finally, be sure to sign commits with your real name. Since by opening
a PR you already have commits, you can add signatures if needed with
something like `git commit -s --amend`.
-->
